enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Chittukku?

The song Chittukku conveys themes of longing and emotional connection, reflecting on relationships and memories.

What is the plot context of the movie Nallavanuku Nallavan?

The movie Nallavanuku Nallavan revolves around themes of love and sacrifice, showcasing the struggles of the protagonist.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by the legendary K. J. Yesudas, known for his soulful renditions.

Who composed the music for Nallavanuku Nallavan?

The music for Nallavanuku Nallavan was composed by the iconic Ilaiyaraaja, a master of melody.

When was Chittukku released?

Chittukku was released on October 22, 1984.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Chittukku from Nallavanuku Nallavan beautifully encapsulates the feelings of nostalgia and longing. It portrays a deep emotional connection, reflecting on the bonds that tie individuals together. The soothing melody, combined with poignant lyrics, evokes a sense of yearning and reminiscence. This classic track remains a cherished piece of Tamil music history, resonating with listeners across generations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chittukku from the classic film Nallavanuku Nallavan is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of nostalgia and longing. With the soulful voice of K. J. Yesudas and the enchanting music by Ilaiyaraaja, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the emotional depth and lyrical beauty that makes this track a timeless favorite.
stanzaMeanings: A small wing has sprouted for the small one, the bonds that came with the blood have broken apart.
There is no father, no mother, just a dream, merely a thought.
The bond that comes to the heart is a continuation of a small story.
A small wing has sprouted for the small one, the bonds that came with the blood have broken apart.
We are the stage where we can perform, we can go to the stage, the paper will flow.
Is love a disguise? Is it a form created by time?
Life that came searching for a shelter has run away.
Who is the one that caused the forest to seek the beginning of the song?
The garland called mother is singing above the stage.
A small wing has sprouted for the small one, the bonds that came with the blood have broken apart.
There is no father, no mother, just a dream, merely a thought.
The bond that comes to the heart is a continuation of a small story.
A small wing has sprouted for the small one.
The scenes that change with time are being narrated here.
The yellow and red adorn the beautiful maiden.
The lamp of love has come to light the path of work.
The joy of womanhood is like a mango that brings happiness.
Even if we fall, we will live with goodness.
A small wing has sprouted for the small one, the bonds that came with the blood have broken apart.
There is no father, no mother, just a dream, merely a thought.
The bond that comes to the heart is a continuation of a small story.
A small wing has sprouted for the small one.
